input.command:
# Wait a moment for nginx ingress to pick up the new cert
sleep 5

# Get the node IP from the env or cluster
source /tmp/ingress_env 2>/dev/null
if [ -z "$INGRESS_NODE_IP" ]; then
  INGRESS_NODE_IP=$(kubectl get nodes -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.addresses[0].address}')
  echo "Using node IP: $INGRESS_NODE_IP"
fi

echo "INGRESS_HTTPS_PORT=$INGRESS_HTTPS_PORT"
echo "INGRESS_NODE_IP=$INGRESS_NODE_IP"

# Test HTTPS access using the curl-test pod
kubectl -n demo exec curl-test -- sh -c \
  "curl -v --cacert /tmp/tls/ca.crt \
    --resolve demo.example.com:${INGRESS_HTTPS_PORT}:${INGRESS_NODE_IP} \
    https://demo.example.com:${INGRESS_HTTPS_PORT}/" 2>&1
